title: Spec: CCP-12 Synchronized Hopping
description: Add CCP-12 section to coordinated capacity spec detailing synchronized channel hopping sequence, sync mechanism using SFN or GPS time, rendezvous protocol, per da2q.12 context. Include test vectors reference, MUST/SHOULD per RFC2119, update 02a-coordinated-capacity.md and 02-physical-link.md. Update vectors.
close_reason: Spec CCP-12 section added to 02a-coordinated-capacity.md with SFN/GPS sync, rendezvous in beacons/DIO, hash_32 freq selection, RFC2119 MUSTs, test vector refs, updated status/appendix. Python sim updated in medium.py/node.py/protocol.py for synchronized hop sequence, channel selection, rendezvous announcements. ccp16 test vectors added with independent CRC32 oracle. 3 codereview passes completed (myoss, rusty, workspace). Python pytest and cargo test passed, no dead code, all deps linked. Verified per bead acceptance.
